Captains, there are times in life when you really want to get everything you need, all at once. That’s what bundles are for! From January 12th at 8am PT (16:00 CET), to January 16th at 10am PT (19:00 CEST), save 35% on Ship Bundles and Expansion Bundles in the Zen Store! Not only that, all the bundles that have previously appeared in Mudd’s Market will return, and be on sale for 50% off! It’s the perfect opportunity to get a great deal on the things you want, all in a convenient package!
